quoteFirst: At 10 A.M., therefore, after intercepting the various messages mentioned above, I reminded the Vice-Admiral of the 2nd Battle Squadron and the Vice-Admiral of the 1st Battle Cruiser Squadron by wireless that this gap existed, and that the enemy would probably emerge there, and Sir George Warrender at
quoteLast: directed Sir David Beatty to pass through the gap towards our coast.
title: The Grand Fleet, 1914-1916
author: Jellicoe, John Rushworth, 1859-1935

quoteLast: , his position is 8° 10′ north of the moon, and on the 1st a little northeast of the nebula _Præsepe_ in _Cancer_.
title: The Chautauquan, Vol. 04, April 1884, No. 7

quoteLast: that February morning he had ascended the broken steps of the old grey mansion, a little curious, perhaps, but, as he would have told you, "ready for anything."
